title: UpdateEventCommand
description: NATS subject: calendar.command.update_event. Triggers a patch update on an existing Google Calendar event. Only fields present are updated. On success, calendar-tool publishes to calendar.event.update.

token.description: Google OAuth2 token for the target calendar user.

event_id.description: Google Calendar event ID to update.

summary.description: New event title. Omit to keep existing.

location.description: New location. Omit to keep existing.

description.description: New description. Omit to keep existing.

start.description: New start in RFC3339. Omit to keep existing.

end.description: New end in RFC3339. Omit to keep existing.

recurrence.description: Replaces recurrence rules. Omit to keep existing.

attendees.description: Replaces full attendee list. Omit to keep existing.
